title: [Bug]:  Podman login false positive
body:
### Issue Description

Podman login should not succeed if a registry is not given 

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
```bash
[eduardo@fedora ~]$ podman login -u bla -p bla 
Login Succeeded!
```


### Describe the results you received

Login Succeeded!

### Describe the results you expected

Error, no registry provided

Additional environment details

### Additional information

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out, @ArangoGutierrez.

When no registry is specified, Podman will pick the first in unqualified-search registry in `registries.conf`.  The first one on Fedora is `registry.fedoraproject.org` and `podman login -u bla -p bla registry.fedoraproject.org` works as well.

It doesn't look like a false positive to me (`docker login` works as well) but a fart on the Fedora registry.

@lsm5 do you know who to report that to?

Cc: @mtrmac
I am closing the issue but we can continue the conversation.

> @lsm5 do you know who to report that to?

Not sure, I'll ask around.
